summary: Tested Admin Source Code Download feature and Agent Portal. All 5 Quick Tools buttons visible in Admin Dashboard. Source download endpoints working with proper auth. Agent Portal login and Service Desk access working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CSS fix for emergent badge selector working correctly - Download Source link is visible
Source download endpoints properly secured with admin HTTP Basic auth
Agent Portal has proper permission-based feature access
seed_data_creation: Created test agent 'testadmin' with password 'test123' and permissions: service_desk, notifications, unified_inbox, orders
context_for_next_testing_agent: Source download feature fully working. Test agent 'testadmin/test123' available for Agent Portal testing. All 5 Quick Tools buttons visible in Admin Dashboard: 1) Enhance All Tags, 2) Seed All Products, 3) Products CSV, 4) Services CSV, 5) Download Source.

source_info_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/source-info returns file statistics (1041 files, 19.09 MB)

download_source_endpoint.details: GET /api/admin/download-source returns ZIP file (~6MB) with proper headers

source_endpoints_auth.details: Both endpoints require admin HTTP Basic auth, reject unauthorized requests

quick_tools_visibility.details: All 5 Quick Tools buttons visible in Admin Dashboard after CSS fix

download_source_button.details: Download Source button visible with correct href to /api/admin/download-source

agent_portal_login.details: Agent login works with testadmin/test123 credentials

service_desk_access.details: Service Desk tab visible and accessible after agent login, shows 150 tickets

notifications_tab.details: Notifications tab visible in Agent Portal navigation

console_warnings: WebSocket connection errors (non-critical, related to real-time features)
Some 401/404 errors for API calls that may require different auth context
